name: killinchu-uds
description: Killinchu — Andean Drone Intelligence (counter-UAS sense-and-evidence). UDS-deployable module of the SZL governed-AI substrate.
deploy_order: amaru -> a11oy -> sentra -> rosie (killinchu rides on UDS Core + szl-receipts)

sbom.format: CycloneDX / SPDX (published at the uds-v0.3.0 release)

cosign.honest_note: HONEST (Doctrine v11, RELEASE_NOTES_v0.4.0): the killinchu Zarf PACKAGE artifact is NOT yet cosign-signed. At uds-v0.3.0 only the vessels module ships a signed Zarf package; the other modules publish SBOM JSON only. `cosign verify` on the bundle artifact WILL FAIL until the org key (U5) is provisioned and the image is pushed (FA-001). The runtime RECEIPTS, however, are REAL: every Khipu receipt is ECDSA-P256-SHA256 DSSE-signed live via /khipu/sign.
blockers: FA-001: push ghcr.io/szl-holdings/killinchu image to GHCR
U5: provision org cosign key + `zarf package publish` the signed tarball
No zarf.yaml in the module repo yet (founder/maintainer action)

airgap: 1. Transfer the cosigned tarball to the airgap host (USB drop-drive): killinchu-uds-<ver>.tar.zst (+ .sig + .sigstore.json + .pub)
2. (when signed) cosign verify-blob --key cosign.pub --signature killinchu-uds-<ver>.tar.zst.sig killinchu-uds-<ver>.tar.zst
3. uds zarf init --confirm   # internal registry + agent (zarf-dev init v0.77.0)
k3d_demo: uds run start   # bootstraps szl-warhacker k3d cluster -> zarf init -> uds-core slim-dev -> szl-receipts -> module
uds run verify  # Doctrine section-10 HTTP-200 evidence

verify.runtime_receipts: REAL — ECDSA-P256-SHA256 DSSE; POST /khipu/verify validates against the embedded cosign public key.
verify.bundle_artifact: PENDING — see cosign.status; honest until FA-001 + U5 complete.
verify.slsa: L1 (honest; L2 for signed runtime receipts; L3 the defined target)

sha256_note: SHA-256 over the canonical JSON of THIS metadata record (self-describing digest). The signed .tar.zst package SHA is PENDING publication (see cosign.status).
